summary: **Coordinator reconciliation, 2026-07-21.** Rev2 (`da60fc28`) was re-reviewed by BOTH a same-vendor Fable 7-lens adversarial pass (`kot-fair-2-rev2-rereview-fable.md`) and the cross-vendor GPT-5.6 gate (`kot-fair-2-rev2-rereview-xvendor.md`). Both verdicts: **NEEDS-REV3 (targeted, no material redesign).** The repair architecture is sound; Rev2's characteristic failure is that fixes were transcribed faithfully but several (i) instantiate constants arithmetically infeasible against the spec's own
title: KOT-FAIR/2 Rev2 re-review — reconciliation (both re-reviews) → Rev3 scope
